title: Depop - buy, sell, discover unique fashion
memory: The extraction of the Depop listing creation page structure is complete, and I have verified all fields, buttons, and sections from top to bottom. I have confirmed there are no login blockers and identified the "Continue" button as the final submission step.

done.text:
I have documented the Depop product creation page. 

1. **URL:** https://www.depop.com/products/create/first/
2. **Order of Fields, Dropdowns, and Buttons:**
   - **Photos Section:**
     - 8 Photo Upload Slots (Accepts JPEG/PNG).
     - Labels: Cover photo, Front, Back, Side, Label, Detail, Flaw.
   - **Description Section:**
     - Description Text Area (1000 character limit).
     - Hashtags Field (5 hashtag limit).
   - **Info Section:**
     - Category (Dropdown/Combobox).
     - Brand (Input/Combobox).
     - Condition (Dropdown/Combobox).
   - **Enhance Your Listing Section:**
     - Color (Multi-select Dropdown, up to 2).
     - Source (Multi-select Dropdown, up to 2).
     - Age (Dropdown, up to 1).
     - Style (Multi-select Dropdown, up to 3).
   - **Item Price Section:**
     - Item Price (Numerical input prefixed with US$).
   - **Location Section:**
     - Country (Dropdown, defaulted to United States).
     - City (Dropdown/Combobox).
   - **Shipping Section:**
     - Domestic Shipping Toggle (Depop Shipping via USPS).
     - 'Add new shipping address' Button.
     - Package size (Dropdown).
     - 'Offer worldwide shipping' Checkbox.
3. **Submit Button:** The primary button is labeled 'Continue'. There is also a 'Not ready to list? Get set up to sell' button.
4. **Login/Blockers:** No login prompts or blockers were encountered; the page was fully accessible.
